ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the trip */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* End timestamp of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (Subscriber or Customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (0 for female, 1 for male, NULL for unspecified) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "route" TEXT /* Geographical route taken during the trip (e.g., a series of coordinates) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip (e.g., sunny, rainy, snowy) */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the bike was returned (1 for returned, 0 for not returned) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the trip in kilometers */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip in km/h */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "current_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently available at the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the station's availability */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., standard, electric) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., available, in maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level for electric bikes (percentage) */,
  "last_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the bike (latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (Subscriber or Customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (0 for female, 1 for male, NULL for unspecified) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips recorded */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips */,
  "most_popular_start_station" INTEGER /* ID of the most popular starting station */,
  "most_popular_end_station" INTEGER /* ID of the most popular ending station */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Most popular hours for trips */,
  "user_demographics" TEXT /* Summary of user demographics (e.g., age distribution, gender ratio) */,
  "station_utilization" TEXT /* Utilization rate of each station */,
  "trip_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of trips by duration and distance */,
  "weather_impact" TEXT /* Impact of weather conditions on trip frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the trip */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the feedback has been addressed (1 for resolved, 0 for unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
